# Coda

> Coda is a self-hosted source breakdown workspace with configurable hierarchy levels, typed fields, PDF page references, and project-scoped integrations.

## Primary documentation

- [Coda overview](index.md): Documentation entry point and product scope.
- [External REST API](external-api.md): Authentication, response format, pagination, concurrency, uploads, activity, and exports.
- [OpenAPI 3.1](openapi.json): Machine-readable external API contract.
- [MCP server](mcp.md): Project-scoped MCP setup, tools, and operational guidance.
- [Architecture](architecture.md): Runtime boundaries, data flow, project model, and source-document lifecycle.
- [Security model](security.md): Sessions, bearer credentials, permissions, storage, networking, and logging.
- [Deployment and operations](operations.md): Compose deployment, health, backup, restore, and upgrade guidance.
- [Condensed LLM reference](llm.md): Integration facts and important invariants.

## Repository references

- [Contributor map](../AGENTS.md): Repository layout, common commands, and change locations.
- [Release history](../CHANGELOG.md): Versioned user-facing changes.
- [Security policy](../SECURITY.md): Private vulnerability reporting policy.
